main_task_prompt: Implement modernization roadmap phase P1 in target project B using modernize artifacts as source of truth. Respect target design, migration strategy, and phase exit criteria.

deliverables: Create target API service skeleton with health endpoint
Implement compatibility adapter for selected read-only endpoints
Add baseline observability and request correlation
prerequisites: Deployment environment for parallel smoke tests is available
exit_criteria: Target service health endpoint responds in deployed environment
Selected read-only endpoints can be served through compatibility adapter
Rollback path keeps source system as primary traffic target
migration_constraints: No cutover of write traffic in this phase
Preserve backward compatibility for existing API consumers
Log and trace IDs must be propagated end-to-end

modernize_constraints: Use modernization docs as source of truth for this phase scope.
Do not expand beyond selected phase; report BLOCKED or follow-up tasks instead.
Respect target design and migration strategy constraints.
definition_of_done: Selected phase deliverables implemented in target project B or explicitly reported BLOCKED.
Validation/testing/review executed according to pipeline flags and orchestrator-pipeline policy.
Reviewer outcome (or explicit skip warning) surfaced in final summary.
Out-of-scope follow-ups listed separately, not silently implemented.
evidence_expectations: Report reviewer outcome and key blockers/issues.
